seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area; reflections allowed, checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: composite: add per-type bounded supply (bounded knapsack) and brood-cell obstacles to the polyomino area-packing board, keeping rotations+reflections; objective = maximize covered honey area.
title: Golden-Super Comb Packing: Filling the Apiary Frames
strategies: trivial baseline: install the single largest comb section that fits and stop
largest-first first-fit greedy: place types in decreasing area, each copy at the first feasible cell/orientation
randomized multi-restart maximal fill: shuffle anchor order, greedily place the largest feasible section at each anchor, keep the best coverage over many restarts
value-density / obstacle-aware local search around brood cells
